name: Yeo Hiap Seng Limited
summary: Yeo Hiap Seng Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture, marketing, distribution, sale, and export of food and beverage products in Singapore, Malaysia, Cambodia, and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Consumer Food and Beverage Products and Others. It offers Asian drinks, ready-to-drink tea, soy drinks, juice drinks, coconut water, carbonated drinks, sparkling water and drinks, flavored drinks, and water; and culinary sauces, culinary pastes, condiments, canned curries, instant noodles and vermicelli, spreads, and canned seafood and vegetables. The company offers its products under the Yeo's, H-TWO-O, Pink Dolphin, Justea, Juscool, Oceanic, pH Infinity, Puret√É¬©, and Sparkle Water brand names. It also manages other brands, such as A1, The Hain Celestial Group, Allswell, Louis Raison, Bel Normande, Red Bull, and Uni-President; provides vending, warehousing, and logistics services; and invests and develops properties. The company was founded in 1900 and is headquartered in Singapore. Yeo Hiap Seng Limited is a subsidiary of Far East Organization Pte. Ltd.
